_about.title: Control-standards pass — ui-button interaction states + focus/a11y, decomposed for a parallel fan-out
_about.serves: Bringing the G5 ui-button up to the control-interaction + accessibility STANDARD (the punch list the wave-2 states showcase surfaced): the booked G4 focus/a11y deferrals (s16 G5 verdict). Every surface is designed to be REUSABLE across the control family, not button-only.
_about.method: decomposing-systems, both planes. OUTSIDE-IN = the surfaces the standard lives on (shared tokens, the control CSS, the trait, the control wiring, the descriptor, the showcase, the reusable standard doc, the A2UI action contract). INSIDE-OUT = the interaction/semantics capabilities the standard must deliver (REALIZE axis: geometry→element→semantics→interaction). The `wave`/`dep`/`files`/`build`/`acceptance` keys overlay the parallel build plan (the coverage gate ignores them).
_about.ground_state: G5 ui-button G5-done but with the G4 deferrals OPEN: button.css has ONLY `cursor:pointer` + the disabled colour repoint (NO :hover/:focus-visible/:active styling); button.ts sets NO tabindex + NO `tabbable` trait + NO `ariaDisabled`; site/pages/states.ts compensates with a labelled `tabindex=0` and honestly notes the focus/active rings are browser defaults. The press-activation trait + the host-as-grid anatomy + the dimensional ramp + forced-colors handling are all in place and UNCHANGED by this pass.
_about.pins: Five ADRs (0008 interaction-state styling · 0009 focus-ring token · 0010 tabbable trait + ariaDisabled · 0011 action-prop shape · 0012 trailing-adornment anatomy) are the wave-0 interface pins: the role-ladder steps, the `--c-focus-ring`/`--ui-focus-ring-*` token NAMES, the `tabbable(host,{disabled})=>release` signature, the `internals.ariaDisabled` mechanics, the canonical `{action,context?,wantResponse?}` shape, and the two-axis anatomy (position slots × `data-role` roles) with role-driven glyph sizing (caret=font). Every wave-1 slice builds against the pins (like phases2-4's B0), so the fan-out needs no cross-slice type/name discovery.
_about.anatomy_scope: SCOPE REFINEMENT (host directive): the canonical anatomy is TWO ORTHOGONAL AXES — SLOTS=position (leading · label · trailing; `label` is ALSO the default unnamed slot) drive the grid columns; ROLES=kind (`data-role`: icon · caret now, tag · badge RESERVED) drive the adornment GLYPH sizing/treatment. The position×role convention is the FAMILY standard (future controls reuse positional slots + a role axis), not button-only. DISCOVERED REALITY — HEAD is `12fdf49` ('refactor(button): name slots by POSITION … content role via data-role'), committed in parallel during this session AFTER 8eb72e7. 12fdf49 ALREADY did: the position rename (slot=icon->slot=leading + label + trailing), the data-role CONVENTION, and migrated button.md + the css/geometry tests + the geometry browser smoke + site/pages/permutations.ts (now slot=leading data-role=icon / slot=trailing data-role=caret). Its commit message records the one omission: '--ui-button-icon (the adornment cell SIZE) left as-is.' So placement is position-driven + the data-role convention is documented, but SIZING is still SLOT-driven (no [data-role] rule) => the caret is icon-sized. ADR-0012 ratifies the two-axis model + closes the ONE real gap: make button.css sizing ROLE-driven ([data-role=icon]->icon cell; [data-role=caret]->font=--ui-button-glyph per geometry.md, centered in the icon cell -> emergent ½(h-font)); reserved tag/badge are additive [data-role] rules. button-doc.ts (NOT touched by 12fdf49) still needs anatomy specimens. RETRACTED: the earlier 'permutations slot=icon drift' finding — 12fdf49 already migrated permutations.ts. Presentation-only: disclosure semantics (aria-haspopup/expanded on the HOST via internals) DEFERRED to a real disclosure/menu control (G7).
_about.scoped_out: The `family` attribute / multi-family vocabulary (tokens.md's open fleet decision — alias-vs-rename) is NOT in this pass; the control stays single-family (primary). This pass establishes the per-VARIANT (solid/soft/ghost) state standard; when `family` lands it refactors to tokens.md's family→intermediates form. Form-association / :state() custom states stay G4-deferred. Disclosure/popup AX for the trailing caret (aria-haspopup/aria-expanded) is G7's (a real disclosure/menu control), NOT this pass — the trailing slot is presentation-only here.

_waves._model: ADR-pin-then-fan-out (the phases2-4 B0 model). Wave 0 = the host ratifies the FIVE ADRs (the name/signature/shape/anatomy pins). Wave 1 = ten FILE-DISJOINT slices fan out concurrently against the pins. Wave 2 = the showcase + the cross-engine smoke INTEGRATE and re-score REALIZE against docs/rubrics/component.md (the showcase IS the visual integration proof, like the A2UI canvas was). Track A (components/shared/site/docs) and Track B (a2ui action contract) are file-disjoint across packages => fully concurrent. NOTE: most of the trailing-anatomy is already SHIPPED (8eb72e7) — its slices are RATIFY+CLOSE-GAP, not greenfield: the only NEW anatomy code is the caret=font delta (folded into css-button, the single button.css writer) + the two example repairs.
wave0_pin: ADRs 0008-0012 (host ratifies + confirms the open questions, incl. ADR-0012's caret-sizing call)

_dependency_edges: ALL wave-1 slices -> the wave-0 ADR pins (token names, trait signature, ariaDisabled mechanics, action shape) — no cross-slice discovery needed

css-button -> tok-focus (SOFT — button.css's :focus-visible consumes --c-focus-ring/--ui-focus-ring-*; the NAMES are pinned in ADR-0009 so css-button authors against them concurrently; runtime-resolves once tok-focus lands)
ts-wire -> trait-tabbable (SOFT — button.ts imports `tabbable`; the SIGNATURE is pinned in ADR-0010 so ts-wire authors concurrently; both files must coexist at the single `npm run check`)
ts-wire -> ariaDisabled is control-level NOT a trait (internals is protected; a trait cannot reach host.internals) — wired via `this.effect` in button.ts

show -> {tok-focus, css-button, ts-wire} (HARD runtime — the showcase demonstrates the now-REAL control-authored states; it only renders the live control + rewrites copy, so its FILE is disjoint, but its ACCEPTANCE integrates after wave 1)
smoke -> {tok-focus, css-button, ts-wire} (HARD — the Chromium+WebKit smoke proves hover/active/:focus-visible px-changes + forced-colors ring survival; the REALIZE re-score, rubric C6/C8/C9)

act-reader -> act-spec (SOFT — readActionSpec implements the shape act-spec pins; the shape is pinned in ADR-0011 so both author concurrently; the existing renderer.test fixture already uses the canonical `{action:'submit'}`)

css-button OWNS button.css for BOTH the interaction-states deltas AND the ADR-0012 role-driven-sizing delta (single writer — different sections of the same file; do NOT split into two button.css writers)

ex-permutations is MINOR — 12fdf49 already migrated permutations.ts to the slot+data-role markup + the four-structure axis; only a makeCaret comment update remains once role-driven caret=font lands. ex-doc -> the live anatomy (SHIPPED by 12fdf49) — adds the missing button-doc.ts specimens. Both wave-1 (separate files), visually verified in wave 2.

smoke -> the role-driven sizing delta (HARD — adds `0 < caret(=font) < icon <= box` + the caret sits FURTHER from the edge than an icon (emergent ½(h-font)); complements the existing geometry assertions, all still pass since glyph-size is layout-local within the unchanged icon cell)

_files_touched._collision_hotspots: controls/button/ holds THREE different files written by THREE slices — button.css (css-button, which carries BOTH the interaction-states deltas AND the ADR-0012 role-driven-sizing delta) · button.ts + button.test.ts (ts-wire) · button.md (desc) — DIFFERENT files, no collision; button.css is SINGLE-WRITER (do not spin a separate anatomy-CSS slice). site/pages/ — states.ts (show), permutations.ts (ex-permutations), button-doc.ts (ex-doc) are three DIFFERENT files, no collision. traits/index.ts barrel is single-writer (trait-tabbable, the only new export this pass). shared/src/tokens/{tokens.css,dimensions.css} are both single-writer (tok-focus). docs/references/ new file is single-writer (ref); if tokens.md gains a states cross-link, assign that edit to ref too (single writer). Track B (a2ui) is a separate package — zero collision with Track A.
_files_touched.tok-focus: packages/agent-ui/shared/src/tokens/tokens.css (+ --c-focus-ring role + its forced-colors=Highlight mapping), packages/agent-ui/shared/src/tokens/dimensions.css (+ --ui-focus-ring-width, --ui-focus-ring-offset on the SAME :root the multipliers live on — constants, no subtree-derived var, so NOT on * per ADR-0007), packages/agent-ui/shared/src/tokens/dimensions.test.ts (assert the two new tokens declared)
_files_touched.css-button: packages/agent-ui/components/src/controls/button/button.css (single writer) — (a) per-variant hover/active state-token rows in [1]; the :focus-visible outline + :active/:hover bg consumption in [2]; the disabled state-HOLD rows; forced-colors keeps the ring. (b) ADR-0012 ROLE-DRIVEN sizing delta: GRID placement stays POSITION-driven (`:has(> [slot=…])`, edge-pad ½(h-icon)); move the adornment GLYPH sizing from slot-driven (`[slot=leading],[slot=trailing] { size: --ui-button-icon }`) to ROLE-driven — `[data-role='icon'] { size: --ui-button-icon }` (fills the cell) + `[data-role='caret'] { size: --ui-button-glyph }` with a new `--ui-button-glyph: var(--ui-button-font)` in [1] (geometry.md's inline-affordance law), the caret CENTERED in the icon-sized cell so it lands at the emergent ½(h-font). Reserved tag/badge = additive [data-role] rules later. button-geometry.test.ts gains the caret-glyph assertion (0 < caret(=font) < icon <= box; caret further from the edge than an icon).
_files_touched.ts-wire: packages/agent-ui/components/src/controls/button/button.ts (single writer — invoke tabbable in connected(); add the `this.effect` that sets internals.ariaDisabled from the disabled signal), packages/agent-ui/components/src/controls/button/button.test.ts (add tabindex-by-default / disabled-removes-tabindex / ariaDisabled + zero-residue cases)
_files_touched.desc: packages/agent-ui/components/src/controls/button/button.md (single writer) — enrich the aria block [ariaDisabled via internals], the keyboard/focus note [tabindex=0 default; disabled removed from tab order], and the prose [real per-variant hover/active + the focus ring]. ANATOMY (ADR-0012): the two-axis slots/roles/disclosure-boundary prose is ALREADY shipped (12fdf49) — add only the role-driven-sizing line (caret = font, --ui-button-glyph) + reinforce the reserved-roles (tag/badge) + family-standard framing + swap the stale 'ADR-0006 extended' citation to ADR-0012. NO attributes[] change => the contract-props trip-wire stays green.
_files_touched.show: site/pages/states.ts (single writer — drop the compensating `focusable`/tabindex=0; rewrite the section copy to describe the REAL control-authored hover/active/:focus-visible per variant; the disabled demo now shows the control is NOT keyboard-reachable, native parity), optionally site/pages/states.css
_files_touched.ref: docs/references/interaction-states.md (NEW — the reusable standard: the per-variant state-token pattern, the focus-ring recipe, the tabbable+ariaDisabled a11y contract; the next control inherits this). Optionally a one-line states cross-link added to docs/references/tokens.md (assign to this slice).
_files_touched.act-spec: packages/agent-ui/a2ui/src/catalog/default/catalog.json (Button.action prop type: tighten {type:object} -> the {action,context?,wantResponse?} object schema), docs/specs/specs/a2ui-catalog.spec.md (note the action PropDef shape on the Button row / §5.1 PropDef)
_files_touched.act-reader: packages/agent-ui/a2ui/src/renderer/renderer.ts (readActionSpec — pin `action` as the canonical name key + document the retained lenient fallbacks), packages/agent-ui/a2ui/src/renderer/renderer.test.ts (assert the canonical shape; the existing fixture already uses {action:'submit'})
_files_touched.ex-permutations: site/pages/permutations.ts (single writer) — MINOR/VERIFY: 12fdf49 ALREADY migrated this page to slot=leading data-role=icon / slot=trailing data-role=caret AND already shows the four-structure anatomy axis ([label]·[icon|label]·[label|caret]·[icon|label|caret]). Remaining: once css-button lands the role-driven caret=font, update the makeCaret comment ('sized to the same icon cell') to reflect caret=font. No drift fix needed (the earlier slot=icon drift finding is RETRACTED).
_files_touched.ex-doc: site/pages/button-doc.ts (single writer) — ADD anatomy specimens (leading-icon, trailing-caret, full [icon|label|caret]) alongside the existing variant/size/disabled specimens, so the doc page demonstrates the structures the directive asks for.

_flags.ladder_separation_RISK: OPEN-Q + RISK — the hover/active steps reuse tokens.md's vetted role ladders (solid: --c-primary -> -dim -> -high; soft: -container-low -> -container -> -container-high; ghost: transparent -> -container-low -> -container). tokens.md ITSELF flags: verify the steps give adequate separation in the REAL palette; if a step is too close, the token layer needs dedicated --c-{f}-hover/-active roles (a new tok-states slice + an ADR-0008 amendment). The ghost hover/active WASH (a container tint on a text variant) is a NEW design choice not in tokens.md. Host to confirm the ladder + the ghost wash.
_flags.focus_ring_aesthetic: OPEN-Q — recommend a DEDICATED --c-focus-ring role (not reusing --c-primary, which would tint every control's ring by the primary family) at width 2px / offset 2px, via `outline` (not box-shadow). The exact hue + width/offset are a token-layer/aesthetic call (tokens-specialist). outline is chosen for forced-colors safety + layout-neutrality; the WebKit rounded-outline-on-a-pill caveat is a wave-2 smoke check (see disabled_focusability and the smoke node).
_flags.disabled_focusability: OPEN-Q (a11y fork) — this pass IMPLEMENTS the host directive: disabled REMOVES the control from the tab order (native <button disabled> parity; rubric C7 'fully inert'). The alternative 'accessible disabled' (keep focusable + aria-disabled so AT users can REACH + hear the disabled control) is a genuine fork with a real tradeoff. Recommend native-parity (host's call); flag for confirm.
_flags.action_tolerance: OPEN-Q (minor) — pin canonical {action,context?,wantResponse?}. Decide: tighten readActionSpec to canonical-only, or KEEP the lenient `name`-synonym + bare-string fallbacks (Postel). Recommend keep-lenient + document `action` as canonical (low-risk; the corpus/fixtures may use the fallbacks).
_flags.barrels: COORDINATION — traits/index.ts (currently `export {}`) is the only barrel this pass touches; single-writer (trait-tabbable). No multi-writer barrel risk.
_flags.no_geometry_impact: NOTE — `outline`/`outline-offset` do NOT affect layout, so the geometry law (geometry.md: block-size lever, padding-block:0, the centering law) is UNTOUCHED by the focus/states work. The cross-engine smoke's existing geometry assertions stay valid; the smoke only GAINS the state/ring assertions. The ADR-0012 role-driven-sizing delta is also layout-local (it sizes the caret GLYPH inside the unchanged icon-sized cell).
_flags.anatomy_shipped_DISCOVERED: DISCOVERED REALITY — HEAD is `12fdf49` (committed in parallel this session, AFTER 8eb72e7): it did the position rename (slot=icon->slot=leading + label + trailing), the data-role POSITION-vs-ROLE convention, and migrated button.md + the css/geometry tests + the geometry browser smoke + permutations.ts. Per its commit message it deliberately 'left --ui-button-icon (the adornment cell SIZE) as-is' => sizing is still SLOT-driven, no [data-role] rule. There was NO ratifying ADR (button.css/button.md cite 'ADR-0006 extended' for an extension ADR that did not exist). ADR-0012 records the two-axis model + closes the role-driven-sizing gap. So the anatomy slices are mostly RATIFY+VERIFY; the only NEW code is the role-driven sizing (css-button) + the button-doc specimens.
_flags.role_sizing_GAP: OPEN-Q + GAP (ADR-0012, the key anatomy call) — button.css sizes the adornment glyph by SLOT (--ui-button-icon for both leading+trailing); there is NO [data-role] rule, so a trailing CARET is icon-sized. geometry.md (the law) says a caret/chevron/arrow is an INLINE AFFORDANCE sized = font; icon-sizing it is the named 'bug class' (oversized ~1.2-1.5x). The host directive: make sizing ROLE-driven. Recommend [data-role=icon]->icon cell + [data-role=caret]->font (--ui-button-glyph), caret centered in the icon cell -> emergent ½(h-font); reserved tag/badge additive. This OVERRIDES a currently-tested decision (12fdf49's geometry test asserts the icon-sized cell — the CELL assertion stays; a GLYPH-level caret=font assertion is added). Host to confirm.
_flags.permutations_already_migrated: RETRACTION/UPDATE — an earlier draft flagged a `slot=icon` drift in permutations.ts. That is RETRACTED: commit 12fdf49 already migrated permutations.ts to slot=leading data-role=icon / slot=trailing data-role=caret and it already renders the four-structure anatomy axis. The only remaining permutations touch is a makeCaret comment update once role-driven caret=font lands (see ex-permutations). button-doc.ts was NOT touched by 12fdf49 and still has NO anatomy specimens (ex-doc adds them).
_flags.disclosure_AX_BOUNDARY: SCOPE BOUNDARY (ADR-0012) — the trailing caret is PRESENTATION-ONLY here. Popup/disclosure semantics (aria-haspopup / aria-expanded) belong on the HOST via ElementInternals and are DEFERRED to a real disclosure/menu control (G7). Do NOT bake popup AX into a plain button — a caret with no popup announcing haspopup would lie to assistive tech.

nodes.label: Control-standards pass — ui-button interaction states + focus/a11y
shared focus-ring tokens — --c-focus-ring role + --ui-focus-ring-width/-offset
nodes.acceptance: --c-focus-ring resolves via light-dark AND maps to Highlight under forced-colors; --ui-focus-ring-width (2px) + --ui-focus-ring-offset (2px) declared on :root (constants, not on *); exported via the existing @agent-ui/shared/{tokens,dimensions}.css barrels; npm run check green.

nodes.label: button.css — per-variant hover/active state tokens + the :focus-visible outline + disabled hold
nodes.dep: ADR-0008 + ADR-0009 (names pinned); soft-needs tok-focus at runtime
nodes.acceptance: solid/soft/ghost EACH react on :hover and :active via a role-ladder step (no color-mix); :focus-visible draws the shared ring (keyboard-only, NO mouse ring); the @scope block still consumes ONLY --ui-button-*; disabled HOLDS at idle (pointer-events:none makes :hover/:active inert) + the forced-colors block keeps ink/border AND the ring.

nodes.label: traits/tabbable.ts — the reusable focusability trait (tabindex=0 default; disabled->removed from tab order)
nodes.acceptance: `tabbable(host,{disabled:()=>boolean})=>release`; a scope-owned `host.effect` sets host.tabIndex=0 when enabled / removes the tabindex attribute when disabled; reacts to the disabled signal; leak-free (effect dies with the connection scope, re-applies on reconnect); release() is idempotent (guarded). Mirrors press-activation's abort/guard discipline. Imports only ../dom (the allowed traits->dom direction).

nodes.label: button.ts — invoke tabbable + the control-level ariaDisabled effect
nodes.acceptance: connected() calls tabbable(this,{disabled:()=>this.disabled}) alongside the existing pressActivation + internals.role; a `this.effect` sets this.internals.ariaDisabled from the disabled signal (announced when disabled, omitted when enabled); the import-layering trip-wire stays green (controls->dom+traits); zero residue on connect->disconnect (no new live listener/subscriber beyond the scope-owned effect).

nodes.label: button.md — descriptor: real states + focusability + ariaDisabled (no attributes[] change)
nodes.acceptance: the aria block records ariaDisabled-via-internals; the keyboard/focus note records tabindex=0-by-default + disabled-removed-from-tab-order; the prose documents the per-variant hover/active + the focus ring; the frontmatter attributes[] is UNCHANGED (variant/size/disabled) so the contract-props trip-wire + frontmatter schema stay green.

nodes.label: references/interaction-states.md (NEW) — the reusable standard the next control inherits
nodes.acceptance: documents (1) the per-variant state-token pattern (--ui-{cmp}-bg[-hover|-active] from role ladders, no color-mix), (2) the focus-ring recipe (the shared tokens + the :focus-visible outline), (3) the tabbable+ariaDisabled a11y contract — as the FLEET standard, so the next control (ui-text-field, ui-checkbox...) inherits it rather than re-deriving.

nodes.label: site/pages/states.ts — showcase: drop the compensating tabindex, demonstrate the REAL states (integration proof)
nodes.acceptance: the page no longer sets `focusable`/tabindex=0 (the control sets it via tabbable); the hover/active/:focus-visible sections describe the REAL control-authored per-variant treatments (the 'browser defaults' honesty notes are gone); the disabled section shows the control is NOT keyboard-reachable (Tab skips it, native parity) + pointer-inert; the live activation log still proves pointer AND keyboard (press-activation).

nodes.label: cross-engine smoke — the REALIZE re-score (hover/active/:focus-visible + forced-colors ring, Chromium AND WebKit)
nodes.files: the existing gold cross-engine smoke suite (extends it; assign to the same owner as css-button or a dedicated test slice)
nodes.acceptance: anti-vacuous in BOTH Chromium + WebKit: :hover and :active change the computed bg px on EACH variant; :focus-visible draws an outline on keyboard focus and NOT on mouse focus; the forced-colors ring survives; the existing geometry assertions still pass (outline is layout-neutral). Re-scores rubric C6/C7/C8/C9 >=4.

nodes.label: A2UI action contract — pin {action,context?,wantResponse?} in the catalog SPEC + default catalog.json
nodes.acceptance: Button.action's PropDef type tightens from bare {type:object} to the {action:string, context?:object, wantResponse?:boolean} object schema; the catalog SPEC §5.1/§5.2 records the shape; loadCatalog/conformance still accept the catalog.

nodes.label: renderer readActionSpec — implement the pinned canonical shape (+ documented tolerance)
nodes.acceptance: readActionSpec reads `action` as the canonical name key per the pinned shape; the lenient `name`-synonym + bare-string fallbacks are KEPT but documented as tolerance (decision pending the action_tolerance flag); the existing round-trip test (fixture {action:'submit'}) stays green + asserts the canonical path.

nodes.label: permutations.ts — VERIFY the four-structure axis (already migrated by 12fdf49); update the caret comment once role-driven caret=font lands
nodes.dep: ADR-0012; permutations.ts ALREADY migrated by 12fdf49 (slot+data-role + the anatomy axis)
nodes.acceptance: the anatomy axis already shows [label]·[icon|label]·[label|caret]·[icon|label|caret] with slot=leading data-role=icon / slot=trailing data-role=caret (12fdf49); after css-button lands role-driven sizing, the trailing caret reads at text scale and the makeCaret 'sized to the icon cell' comment is corrected. NO drift fix (retracted).

nodes.label: button-doc.ts — add anatomy specimens (leading-icon, trailing-caret, full [icon|label|caret])
nodes.dep: ADR-0012; the live anatomy is SHIPPED
nodes.acceptance: the doc page renders live specimens of the leading-icon, trailing-caret, and full [icon|label|caret] structures alongside the existing variant/size/disabled specimens — the structures the directive asks for are visibly demonstrated.

actions.label: every variant (solid/soft/ghost) shows a token-driven :hover bg from a role-ladder step (no color-mix)
every variant shows a token-driven :active (pressed) bg from a role-ladder step
disabled stays fully inert — the state overlay holds at idle (no hover/active lift), pointer-inert
keyboard focus draws a consistent ring (:focus-visible ONLY, no mouse ring), forced-colors-safe
a single SHARED focus-ring token (colour role + width/offset) every control reads
a control is keyboard-focusable by default (tabindex=0, role=button parity)
disabled REMOVES the control from the tab order (native parity), reconnect-safe + leak-free
the disabled AX state is announced via internals.ariaDisabled, reactive to the disabled prop
the now-real states + focusability + ariaDisabled are documented in the descriptor (no contract drift)
the showcase demonstrates the control-authored states + drops the compensating tabindex
the states + ring + forced-colors survival are PROVEN anti-vacuous in Chromium AND WebKit (REALIZE re-score)
the interaction-state + focus-ring + tabbable patterns are captured as a REUSABLE standard the next control inherits
the canonical inbound action-prop shape is PINNED in the catalog SPEC + catalog.json (the reader implements a contract, not a guess)
the renderer reads the pinned shape (with documented tolerance)
SLOTS = position: leading · label (also the default unnamed slot) · trailing drive the grid columns — four presence-driven :has() structures (SHIPPED 12fdf49; ratify ADR-0012)

ROLES = kind via data-role (icon · caret now; tag · badge RESERVED, additive) — orthogonal to position; adornments decorative/aria-hidden, label stays the accessible name; the position×role convention is the FAMILY standard (SHIPPED convention 12fdf49; ratify)

button.css sizes the adornment GLYPH by ROLE ([data-role]): icon fills the cell (=--ui-button-icon); caret = font (--ui-button-glyph, geometry.md's inline-affordance law) centered in the icon cell -> emergent ½(h-font) — NOT slot-driven icon-sizing (closes the gap 12fdf49 left open)
popup/disclosure semantics (aria-haspopup/expanded) ride the HOST via internals, NEVER the glyph — deferred to a real disclosure/menu control (G7); the trailing slot is presentation-only here
the showcase + doc specimens DEMONSTRATE the four structures (permutations already migrated by 12fdf49 — verify; button-doc gains anatomy specimens)
